# services.firefly-iii

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.firefly-iii`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.firefly-iii.dataDir` | `absolute path` | The place where firefly-iii stores its state. |
| `services.firefly-iii.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Firefly III: A free and open source personal finance manager. |
| `services.firefly-iii.enableNginx` | `boolean` | Whether to enable nginx or not. If enabled, an nginx virtual host will be created for access to firefly-iii. If not enabled, then you may use `${config.services.firefly-iii.package}` as your document root in whichever webserver you wish to setup. |
| `services.firefly-iii.group` | `string` | Group under which firefly-iii runs. It is best to set this to the group of whatever webserver is being used as the frontend. |
| `services.firefly-iii.package` | `package` | The firefly-iii package to use. |
| `services.firefly-iii.poolConfig` | `attribute set of (string or signed integer or boolean)` | Options for the Firefly III PHP pool. See the documentation on <literal>php-fpm.conf</literal> for details on configuration directives. |
| `services.firefly-iii.settings` | `open submodule of attribute set of (string or signed integer or boolean)` | Options for firefly-iii configuration. Refer to <https://github.com/firefly-iii/firefly-iii/blob/main/.env.example> for details on supported values. All <option>\_FILE values supported by upstream are supported here. APP_URL will be the same as `services.firefly-iii.virtualHost` if the former is unset in `services.firefly-iii.settings`. |
| `services.firefly-iii.settings.APP_ENV` | `one of "local", "production", "testing"` | The app environment. It is recommended to keep this at "local". Possible values are "local", "production" and "testing" |
| `services.firefly-iii.settings.APP_KEY_FILE` | `absolute path` | The path to your appkey. The file should contain a 32 character random app key. This may be set using `echo "base64:$(head -c 32 /dev/urandom \| base64)" > /path/to/key-file`. |
| `services.firefly-iii.settings.APP_URL` | `string` | The APP_URL used by firefly-iii internally. Please make sure this URL matches the external URL of your Firefly III installation. It is used to validate specific requests and to generate URLs in emails. |
| `services.firefly-iii.settings.DB_CONNECTION` | `one of "sqlite", "pgsql", "mysql"` | The type of database you wish to use. Can be one of "sqlite", "mysql" or "pgsql". |
| `services.firefly-iii.settings.DB_HOST` | `string` | The machine which hosts your database. This is left at the default value for "mysql" because we use the "DB_SOCKET" option to connect to a unix socket instead. "pgsql" requires that the unix socket location be specified here instead of at "DB_SOCKET". This option does not affect "sqlite". |
| `services.firefly-iii.settings.DB_PORT` | `null or signed integer` | The port your database is listening at. sqlite does not require this value to be filled. |
| `services.firefly-iii.user` | `string` | User account under which firefly-iii runs. |
| `services.firefly-iii.virtualHost` | `string` | The hostname at which you wish firefly-iii to be served. If you have enabled nginx using `services.firefly-iii.enableNginx` then this will be used. |
